basis: Global operating point (balanced Youden's-J) on bge-reranker-v2-m3 cross-encoder LOGITS (not bi-encoder), EN held-out full-data fit 2026-06-24. The tau VALUE is a threshold on logits, but ROUTING is precision-dependent: int8 is SAFETY-DISQUALIFIED (2026-06-25, b76ca28) — it over-routes 6/6 id_oos clinician-territory cases that fp32 ABSTAINS; ship fp32 only. Gate at this tau (fp32, honest CV-OOF, stabilized per-fold tau pre-reg 6b08189): in_scope 60 / id_oos 86 / far_oos 100 — clean per-stratum win, no cell below V1. Stabilized per-fold tau converged to ~this global value, so per-fold CV and shipping config agree.
_note_ar: AR is uncalibrated pending native-Khaleeji review (the standing data gate). A lang absent from rerank_tau resolves to -inf -> routes top-1 (no ABSTAIN), so AR does not get the reranker ABSTAIN until its cells are reviewed and its own tau is fit.
